name: narrative-forge
description: Narrative Forge - The 11-domain interactive truth engine exposing legacy media, political, bureaucratic, legal, financial, cultural, and health systems tactics through thought bridges, graphs, flowcharts, memes, and public data synthesis. Built with PHP/Composer backend + modern JS frontend.

scripts.test:benchmark: echo 'FULL PERF SUITE: Open tests/benchmark-harness.html (or ?auto param / serve) for automated 100/500/1k/10k + FPS/memory/drawCalls (renderer.info) + Spector + WebGPU notes. Or: npx http-server -p 8080 . && open http://localhost:8080/tests/benchmark-harness.html'
scripts.test:perf: npm run test:benchmark && echo 'Also run Playwright for e2e perf observers: npm run test:e2e -- --grep="FPS|perf|stress"'
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:perf && npm run test:e2e
